title: 皐月賞の後に・冠ゲット☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After winning the first Classic Triple Crown race,
the Satsuki Sho, and defeating the other members
of the big three, Seiun Sky strikes a rarely seen
victorious pose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she can't sit by and idly enjoy the next
race—not when it's the dream of her rival Special
Week to dominate the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, Seiun Sky receives a
congratulatory phone call from her grandfather. It
turns out her participation in the Classics has
been his dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this, she's kept her composure and
remained herself. It's time to prepare for the
Japanese Derby, the second race of the Classic
Triple Crown.
